_comment: Explicit middleware load order — replaces filesystem-inode-dependent readdirSync order. Earlier entries run first within each phase (onRequest, onToolResult). Files not listed here are loaded AFTER the manifest, alphabetically, with a warning. Add new middleware to this list at the position that matches its dependencies.

_categories.context-injection: Builds the prompt before request hits Anthropic
_categories.post-tool-trace: Records what just happened (state, KB, activity)
_categories.diagnostic: Surfaces failures back to the agent on the next turn
